class.name: ARPointCloud
class.brief_description: A sparse set of feature points detected by ARKit.
class.description: Stores a sparse cloud of visual feature points tracked by ARKit. Feature points are useful for debugging tracking quality, building visualization tools, or understanding the density of the mapped environment.

method.name: get_identifier
method.description: Returns the persistent identifier for the feature point at [param index].

method.name: get_point
method.description: Returns the feature-point position at [param index].

members.member: The number of feature points in this cloud.
Stable identifiers for the feature points, matching the order of [member points].
